{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = The Last Horizon crew
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Last Horizon]] has six crew members with a unique arrangement.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c15">''The Captain'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
